4. **Mixed Evidence**: While some locations clearly have wait times under 30 minutes (Brooklyn DMV at ~15 minutes, some NYC locations), many others exceed this threshold (California average 38 minutes, North Carolina average 90 minutes, Charlotte area 1+ hours).

The evidence demonstrates that both scenarios are possible - some DMV locations do have wait times under 30 minutes while others significantly exceed this threshold. Without being able to identify the specific "nearest" DMV location and verify its wait time at the original prediction time, the claim cannot be definitively confirmed or refuted.
